title: VS Code mein Multiple Cursors ka use karo
full_content:
Multiple Cursors kaise lagayein?

Alt + Click — jahan click karoge wahan cursor lag jayega.

Ctrl + Alt + ↑/↓ — upar ya neeche cursor add karo.

Ctrl + D — selected word ke next occurrence par cursor add karo.

Isse tum ek saath multiple jagah edit kar sakte ho — bahut time bachta hai!

title: Git Commit Messages achhe kaise likhein
full_content:
Achhe commit message ka format:

type: short summary (50 chars max)

Detailed explanation if needed.

Types:
feat: new feature
fix: bug fix
docs: documentation
style: formatting
refactor: code restructure
test: add tests

Example:

feat: add user authentication

Implemented JWT-based auth with login/logout endpoints.

title: Console.log se zyada powerful debugging tricks
full_content:
Console ke powerful methods:

// Table format mein data
console.table([{name: 'Ram', age: 25}, {name: 'Shyam', age: 30}]);

// Time measurement
console.time('loop');
for(let i=0; i<1000; i++) {}
console.timeEnd('loop');

// Grouped logs
console.group('User Details');
console.log('Name: Ram');
console.log('Age: 25');
console.groupEnd();

// Conditional logging
console.assert(2+2 === 5, 'Math is broken!');

title: CSS mein :is() aur :where() ka smart use
full_content:
Pehle (repetitive):

header a:hover,
footer a:hover,
nav a:hover {
  color: blue;
}

Ab (:is() se):

:is(header, footer, nav) a:hover {
  color: blue;
}

Difference: :is() specificity highest selector ki hoti hai, :where() ki specificity 0 hoti hai — override karna easy ho jata hai.
